chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: 1034 - وَ سُئِلَ: عَنِ اَلْمَرِيضِ لاَ يَسْتَطِيعُ اَلْجُلُوسَ أَ يُصَلِّي وَ هُوَ مُضْطَجِعٌ وَ يَضَعُ عَلَى جَبْهَتِهِ شَيْئاً فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ لَمْ يُكَلِّفْهُ اَللَّهُ إِلاَّ طَاقَتَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1034 - It was asked about a sick person who is unable to sit—whether they can pray while lying down and placing something on their forehead.
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, Allah (swt) has not burdened them beyond their capacity."
